prompt: Use openagentsbtw. Route planning through athena-style architecture analysis on the main profile. Treat native /plan as reasoning mode only, not role selection. On Pro plans, default to multi-agent routing when it materially improves outcomes (disjoint ownership; avoid parallel edits). Use prompt contracts: explicit step order, explicit ask-vs-proceed rules, and crisp completion criteria. Before the recommendation, name 2-3 key assumptions, the most likely failure mode, and what evidence would materially change the plan. Lead with the recommendation and keep the plan concrete.
